src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/config/.general_idea: Migrate Auth0 client initialization to use the new builder pattern and explicit HTTP client configuration.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/config/.why_exists: The old constructor `new AuthAPI(...)` is deprecated or removed in newer versions of the Auth0 Java client library (v2.x), requiring the use of `AuthAPI.newBuilder()` to compile.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/config/.general_idea: Replace Swagger 2.x JAX-RS integration with Swagger 3.x (OpenAPI) integration to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE namespaces.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/config/.why_exists: Swagger 2.x artifacts (io.swagger.jaxrs) are incompatible with Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21; using them causes compile errors or runtime classloading failures.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/config/.general_idea: Replace manual Swagger 2.x configuration method with simple registration of OpenAPI resource in OrganisationsAPIConfig.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/config/.why_exists: Swagger 2.x BeanConfig and ApiListingResource are not available or compatible in the new Swagger 3.x stack.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/config/.general_idea: Replace manual Swagger 2.x configuration method with simple registration of OpenAPI resource in ProvidersAPIConfig.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/config/.why_exists: Swagger 2.x BeanConfig and ApiListingResource are not available or compatible in the new Swagger 3.x stack.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/excepti.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS imports from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/excepti.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.ws.rs does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3 / Java 21).

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/filter/.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS imports from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/filter/.why_exists: javax.ws.rs classes are not present in the classpath when using Jakarta EE 9+ dependencies (Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors due to missing symbols.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.
